title: Altar SMP
description: Legendary weapons plugin for Minecraft 1.21.x Adds powerful legendary weapons with custom textures and abilities to enhance your SMP experience.
body:
# ⚔️ AltarSMP - Legendary Weapons

Add **13 unique legendary weapons** with custom models and powerful abilities to your Minecraft server!

## ✨ Weapons

| Weapon | Ability 1 | Ability 2 |
|--------|-----------|-----------|
| **Hyperion** | Scorching Blade | Holy Lance |
| **Nightpiercer** | Transformation | Crimson Bite |
| **Frost Scythe** | Command of Ice | Scythe Throw |
| **Wand of Illusion** | Disguise as mobs | - |
| **Bone Blade** | Skeletal Leap | Bone Cage |
| **Bloodlust** | Kill to get stronger | - |
| **Vulcan's Crossbow** | Vulcan's Wrath | - |
| **Shadow Blade** | Shadow Leap | Shadow Daggers |
| **Cutlass** | Thousand Cuts | Parry |
| **Paladin's Battle Axe** | Earthshatter | Stalwart Absorption |
| **Mindweaver** | Mind Leap | Mindweaver Gust |
| **Pure Blade** | Shade Soul | Cyclone Slash |
| **Earth Gauntlet** | Meteor Strike | Mudslide |
| **Wither Reaper** | Wither Leap | Wither Cleansing |

## 🎮 How to Use

- Hold weapon in **offhand** and click for **Ability 1**
- Hold weapon in **offhand** + **crouch** for **Ability 2**

## 📋 Requirements

- Minecraft **1.21.x**
- Paper/Spigot/Purpur server
- **https://modrinth.com/plugin/free-minecraft-models/versions For Texture Packs!**

## 📥 Installation

1. Download the plugin (.jar) and resource pack (.zip)
2. Put the .jar in your `plugins` folder
3. Give players the resource pack (server or manual)
4. Use `/legendaries` to get weapons!

## 🛠️ Commands

| Command | Permission | Description |
|---------|------------|-------------|
| `/legendaries` | `altarsmp.legendaries` | Open weapons GUI |
| `/altar spawn` | `altarsmp.admin` | Spawn crafting altar |
| `/cooldown <player>` | `altarsmp.cooldown` | Clear cooldowns |

---
Made with ❤️ by Waterlity

U can download The Texture pack in Our Server!
